headline.text: L3 ML1 lost *2.5 hours* overnight when hopper temperature spiked to 120°F — back at 03:10 but Bosch and Cavanna still fighting at window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 cleared a 66-minute steam outage and metal detector belt failure on S3, then isolated 4.5 pallets from MM3 after a missing screw was discovered at 22:28 — x-ray testing confirmed rejection capability, pallets will re-run on second shift. S4 ran Bequet caramel trials with good results by end of shift, but fructose stock ran short for the planned 15-batch run on 5/22. MM4 pouch sealing issues persisted through the night.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML2 stopped at 15:41 when caramel tank temperature dropped to 89°F instead of 93°F, back up at 16:18 but caramel flow remained slow. Third shift found a blue glove in contact with Brookies product at 01:51 — pallet moved to hold. FW jams at 22:24 triggered a CIL that ran until 08:27.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 lost 2.5 hours overnight when the hopper hit 120°F and molds stopped demolding properly — line restarted at 03:10. Multiple Bosch and Cavanna issues throughout the window: inclusion vacuum valve at 10:22 (cleared), Cavanna belt and roller failures at 13:59, 20:19, and 20:56 (all cleared), and Cavanna FW breaking at 23:17 (cleared at 00:12). At window close, Bosch C3 belt is still accumulating chocolate since 07:43 and Cavanna maintenance continues adjustments since 09:21.

notes.text: S4 Bequet caramel trial progressed well — plan to run 15 continuous batches on first shift 5/22, Celtic salt sourced and depositing by 09:52.
Bequet caramel cup specs (WIP) now available in SC as of 09:38.
ML4 startup flush in progress — tempering unit 1 oil drained by end of third shift, flush caddy hookup planned for first shift.

resolved.title: Kettles lost steam for cooking
resolved.summary: Steam regained at 15:49, kitchen operators estimated 5pm restart for depositing caramel.
resolved.resolution: Resumed depositing at 16:55 — "We've resumed depositing" (William Beattie).

resolved.title: Metal detector belt not starting
resolved.summary: Belt failed to start at 17:02, Caleb or Jon called to assist.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 17:30, QA verified all test cards rejected properly — "I fix" (Caleb York).

resolved.title: S2 jar printer date code too long
resolved.summary: Date code format too wide for printer ribbon, cutting off digits despite font size adjustments.
resolved.resolution: Mariela decreased font size and bolded the date, now fits and legible as of 09:05 — "After Mariela modified the job, it now fits and we are running" (Troy Baxter).

resolved.title: Chocolate buildup on bottomer north side
resolved.summary: Significant buildup on S2 bottomer north side noticed at 06:50, considered reheat but decided to clean during shift.
resolved.resolution: Team cleaned conbar and scraper, line started up at 07:38 — "CAR is looking really good. Line is starting up" (Nathan Topham).

resolved.title: ML2 caramel tank temperature dropped
resolved.summary: Tank set at 89°F instead of 93°F, colder caramel stopped the line at 15:41.
resolved.resolution: Temperature adjusted to 93°F, line back up at 16:18 — "Line was back up and running at 3:51" (Brandon Lance).

resolved.title: ML2 FW dirty causing jams, stopped for CIL
resolved.summary: FW machine very dirty with repeated jams, stopped for clean-in-line at 22:24.
resolved.resolution: CIL completed, line back up at 08:27 on 5/22 — "Line is down for CIL" followed by "line was back up at 8:45am" (Alex Mendoza).

resolved.title: Cavanna FW keeps breaking
resolved.summary: Cavanna flow-wrap repeatedly breaking at 23:17, waiting on maintenance.
resolved.resolution: Cavanna started running back at 00:12 — "Cavanna start running back" (Raoul Lubain).

resolved.title: ML1 molds not demolding, line down 2.5 hours
resolved.summary: Molds coming out full with chocolate and not demolding properly at 00:57, maintenance diagnosing issue.
resolved.resolution: Line restarted at 03:10 — hopper temperature was too high at 120°F, maintenance corrected (Raoul Lubain).

resolved.title: ML1 inclusion vacuum not suctioning
resolved.summary: Inclusion vacuum failed at 10:22, maintenance called to diagnose and repair.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 12:17 — pot valve was not fully open, preventing almond flow, will add to startup checklist (Grey Boscan).

resolved.title: Cavanna product coming out open
resolved.summary: Cavanna producing open product at 13:59, line stopped for 16 minutes while technician adjusted.
resolved.resolution: Cavanna working at 15:13 — "Cavanna is working now" (Molding Line 1 Flow-Wrap).

resolved.title: Cavanna outfeed belt roller fell off
resolved.summary: Roller on Cavanna after-jaws outfeed belt fell off at 20:56, maintenance notified.
resolved.resolution: Line running again at 21:05 — "line running again" (Nathan Gevenois).

resolved.title: ML1 camera alarm triggered
resolved.summary: Camera alarm at 03:18, maintenance, QA, supervisor, and manager inspecting.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 03:29 — no issues found, dirty pin caused the alarm (Raoul Lubain).

resolved.title: Truffle pack-off conveyor grinding and hopping
resolved.summary: Pack-off conveyor had gear grinding and drive belt hopping issues.
resolved.resolution: Running smooth at 11:52 — installed beefier belt guides from used roller and new bearings (Nathan Ruiz).

resolved.title: Cavanna belt tension loose
resolved.summary: Cavanna infeed belt tension got loose at 20:19, maintenance notified.
resolved.resolution: Belt fixed at 20:34 — "Cavanna belt is fixed" (Molding Line 1 Flow-Wrap).

needs_attention.title: MM3 part failure, 4.5 pallets on hold
needs_attention.summary: Operator found screw in MM3 at 22:28, arm piece fell out with bolt and washer unaccounted for — x-ray test on matching parts confirmed rejection, 4 pallets plus 1 partial from preceding hour on hold.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance replaced missing component at 23:00, QA verified x-ray would reject matching parts, 4.5 pallets on hold to be re-run through x-ray on second shift per Dakota at 23:38.

needs_attention.title: MM4 excessive bad pouch sealing
needs_attention.summary: Wrinkled seals and too much silver showing on MM4 pouches since 18:54, Caleb and Jon working on machine.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance raised bag height at 19:16 to reduce flex, but maintenance back again at 22:06 due to excessive bad seals continuing.

needs_attention.title: Fructose shortage for Bequet trial
needs_attention.summary: Only 125 lbs of fructose (item 10268) available, enough for 5 batches but 15 batches planned for S4 Bequet trial on first shift 5/22.
needs_attention.status: Jazmin asked Martin, Carlos, and Sunny at 07:56 for update on 10268 arrival, no response by window close. Ira confirmed at 08:08 the 5 batches are the limit.

needs_attention.title: 3 high-viscosity caramel batches in a row
needs_attention.summary: Three consecutive batches came in high on viscosity, asking to evaluate cooking temperature (currently 225°F).
needs_attention.status: Nathan asking Justin and Curt at 10:01 if they want to evaluate cooking temp, no response in window.

needs_attention.title: Blue glove found in Brookies product
needs_attention.summary: Foreign material (blue glove) found in contact with Brookies product at 01:51, does not match orange gloves used in grinding area.
needs_attention.status: Pallet moved to holding area, production monitoring continues. Lot 02232026B2 for cookie (10147) and 02202026A2 for brownie (10148).

needs_attention.title: Bosch C3 belt accumulating chocolate
needs_attention.summary: Since startup at 07:43, chocolate accumulating on C3 belt causing sticking and overlapping before entering rail.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance in line trying to fix as of 07:43, operators tried adjustments with no success, Chris arrived at 07:54 to work on line, still in progress at window close 10:03.

needs_attention.title: Cavanna requiring continuous adjustments
needs_attention.summary: Cavanna requiring ongoing maintenance adjustments since 09:21, Chris and Preston working on multiple issues.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance continues working at Cavanna as of 09:21. Grey reported at 09:43 Bosch not yet running, team focused on Cavanna first then will check Bosch.

needs_attention.title: ML1 outfeed belt roller came off
needs_attention.summary: A roller came off from the outfeed belt at 09:55, maintenance working on it.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance working on outfeed belt roller as of 09:55, no resolution posted by window close 10:03.
